---
title: "Notebooks"
subtitle: "Énoncés des séances pratiques"
toc: false
---

::: {.casc-info-banner}
{{< bi info-circle-fill >}}

Pour télécharger un notebook, **cliquez-droit** sur le lien et choisissez « Enregistrer le lien sous… ». Les soumissions s'effectuent via [Educnet](https://educnet.enpc.fr/).
:::

::: {.casc-notebook-table}

| Semaine                    | Sujet                         | Énoncé                                                                                                 | Solution                                                              | Soumission Educnet                                                                                                                                   |
| ---------                  | -------                       | --------                                                                                               | ----------                                                            | --------------------------                                                                                                                           |
| [Sem. 1]{.casc-week-badge} | Introduction au langage Julia | [{{< bi file-earmark-code >}} Notebook](notebooks/intro_julia.ipynb){download="intro_julia.ipynb"}     | [{{< bi file-earmark-text >}} HTML](notebooks/intro_julia_sol.html)   | [{{< bi cloud-upload >}} 22/04/2026](https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75232){.casc-deadline data-deadline="2026-04-22T23:59:00+02:00"} |
| [Sem. 2]{.casc-week-badge} | Interpolation et intégration  | [{{< bi file-earmark-code >}} Notebook](notebooks/interpolation.ipynb){download="interpolation.ipynb"} | [{{< bi file-earmark-text >}} HTML](notebooks/interpolation_sol.html) | [{{< bi cloud-upload >}} 06/05/2026](https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75420){.casc-deadline data-deadline="2026-05-06T23:59:00+02:00"} |
| [Sem. 3]{.casc-week-badge} | Systèmes linéaires            | [{{< bi file-earmark-code >}} Notebook](notebooks/linear.ipynb){download="linear.ipynb"}               | [{{< bi file-earmark-text >}} HTML](notebooks/linear_sol.html)        | [{{< bi cloud-upload >}} 20/05/2026](https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75567){.casc-deadline data-deadline="2026-05-20T23:59:00+02:00"} |
| [Sem. 4]{.casc-week-badge} | Problèmes aux valeurs propres | [{{< bi file-earmark-code >}} Notebook](notebooks/eigen.ipynb){download="eigen.ipynb"}                 | [À venir]{.casc-action-ghost}                                         | [{{< bi cloud-upload >}} 03/06/2026](https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75629){.casc-deadline data-deadline="2026-06-03T23:59:00+02:00"} |
| [Sem. 5]{.casc-week-badge} | Systèmes non-linéaires        | [{{< bi file-earmark-code >}} Notebook](notebooks/nonlinear){download="eigen.ipynb"}                   | [À venir]{.casc-action-ghost}                                         | [{{< bi cloud-upload >}} 10/06/2026](https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75630){.casc-deadline data-deadline="2026-06-10T23:59:00+02:00"} |

:::

<script>
(() => {

  const mn = ['janvier','février','mars','avril','mai','juin','juillet','août','septembre','octobre','novembre','décembre'];
  const tip = document.createElement('div');
  tip.className = 'casc-deadline-tooltip';
  let iv = null;

  document.querySelectorAll('.casc-deadline').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {
      const d = new Date(this.dataset.deadline);
      if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return;
      const day = d.getDate(), m = mn[d.getMonth()], y = d.getFullYear(),
            h = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0'), min = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');
      tip.innerHTML =
`<div class="casc-dtl-header">${m} ${y}</div>
<div class="casc-dtl-body">
  <div class="casc-dtl-day">${day}</div>
  <div class="casc-dtl-time">⏰ ${h}h${min}</div>
  <div class="casc-dtl-divider"></div>
  <div class="casc-dtl-countdown casc-dtl-safe">
    <span class="casc-dtl-n">--</span>j ·
    <span class="casc-dtl-h">--</span>h ·
    <span class="casc-dtl-m">--</span>m ·
    <span class="casc-dtl-s">--</span>s
  </div>
</div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(tip);
      const r = this.getBoundingClientRect(), tr = tip.getBoundingClientRect();
      let l = r.left + r.width/2 - tr.width/2, t = r.top - tr.height - 12;
      if (l < 10) l = 10;
      if (l + tr.width > window.innerWidth - 10) l = window.innerWidth - tr.width - 10;
      if (t < 10) t = r.bottom + 12, tip.classList.add('casc-dtl-below');
      else tip.classList.remove('casc-dtl-below');
      tip.style.left = l + 'px'; tip.style.top = t + 'px';

      const fn = () => {
        const df = d - new Date();
        const cd = tip.querySelector('.casc-dtl-countdown');
        if (df <= 0) {
          cd.className = 'casc-dtl-countdown casc-dtl-expired';
          cd.innerHTML = '⛔ Date dépassée';
          if (iv) { clearInterval(iv); iv = null; }
          return;
        }
        const days = Math.floor(df / 86400000);
        const hrs = Math.floor((df % 86400000) / 3600000);
        const mins = Math.floor((df % 3600000) / 60000);
        const secs = Math.floor((df % 60000) / 1000);
        tip.querySelector('.casc-dtl-n').textContent = days;
        tip.querySelector('.casc-dtl-h').textContent = hrs;
        tip.querySelector('.casc-dtl-m').textContent = mins;
        tip.querySelector('.casc-dtl-s').textContent = secs;
        cd.className = days < 1 ? 'casc-dtl-countdown casc-dtl-critical' : days < 7 ? 'casc-dtl-countdown casc-dtl-warning' : 'casc-dtl-countdown casc-dtl-safe';
      };
      fn(); if (iv) clearInterval(iv); iv = setInterval(fn, 1000);
    });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      if (iv) { clearInterval(iv); iv = null; }
      tip.remove();
    });
  });
})();
</script>
